description_long: This object is a stylized flower with five broad, translucent yellow petals arranged in a radial pattern around a central core. The petals are slightly curved and overlap at their bases, giving the flower a layered appearance. The stem is slender and green, with a gentle curve and two attached leaves, one larger and one smaller, both with a soft, ovate shape. The leaves and stem are also semi-transparent, with a light green hue and subtle veining. The overall form is delicate and airy, with visible gaps between the petals and leaves, suggesting a lightweight structure. The flower appears decorative and could be used as an ornamental element in urban parks or garden settings.
description: A delicate, translucent yellow flower with five broad petals, a slender green stem, and two ovate leaves. The design is airy and stylized, with overlapping petals and a lightweight appearance.
description_view_0: The flower is seen at an angle, highlighting the overlapping petals and the curvature of the stem and leaves.
description_view_1: A frontal view showing the full radial symmetry of the five petals and both leaves clearly visible.
description_view_2: A side view emphasizing the thinness of the petals and the layered structure of the flower.
description_view_3: A rear-angled view displaying the back of the petals and the curvature of the stem and leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with five broad petals radiating symmetrically from the central core. The petals overlap slightly at their bases, forming a whorled pattern typical of many ornamental flowers.
